orchestrator.name: strands_etl_orchestrator
orchestrator.description: ETL Orchestration: S3 Stale Detection -> Glue Trigger -> Validation -> Audit & Dashboard Email
orchestrator.run_mode_options_doc: full_pipeline = stale check + glue trigger + validations | validation_only = skip stale check & glue, run validations directly | summary = run summary queries with chart generation

queries.name: landing_row_count_check
queries.description: Verify rows were loaded into the landing table
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM landing_db.{table_name} WHERE load_date = current_date

queries.name: duplicate_check
queries.description: Check for duplicate primary keys in landing
queries.query: SELECT primary_key, COUNT(*) as dup_cnt FROM landing_db.{table_name} GROUP BY primary_key HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 LIMIT 10

queries.name: null_key_check
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as null_cnt FROM landing_db.{table_name} WHERE primary_key IS NULL

queries.name: freshness_check
queries.description: Verify data freshness - latest load_timestamp within expected window
queries.query: SELECT MAX(load_timestamp) as latest_ts, date_diff('hour', MAX(load_timestamp), current_timestamp) as hours_since FROM landing_db.{table_name}

comparison_checks.name: landing_vs_source_row_count
comparison_checks.description: Compare row count between landing table and source staging to verify complete data transfer

query_a.label: Landing Table
query_a.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM landing_db.macp_address_tb WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date

query_b.label: Source Staging
query_b.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM staging_db.macp_address_tb_stg WHERE cast(load_date as date) = current_date

comparison_checks.name: member_info_count_tolerance
comparison_checks.description: MRD Member Info row counts should be within 5% between landing and curated

query_a.label: Landing
query_a.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_info WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date

query_b.label: Curated
query_b.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM curated_db.mrd_mbr_info WHERE cast(update_date as date) = current_date

comparison_checks.name: customer_non_zero_check
comparison_checks.description: Verify that the customer landing table has non-zero rows loaded today

query_a.label: Customer Landing
query_a.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM landing_db.macp_customer WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date

comparison_checks.name: delta_membership_diff
comparison_checks.description: Compare membership numbers between source delta and target delta to find missing or extra records

query_a.label: Source Delta
query_a.query: SELECT membership_number, member_name, plan_code FROM landing_db.mbr_delta WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date

query_b.label: Target Delta
query_b.query: SELECT membership_number, member_name, plan_code FROM curated_db.mbr_delta WHERE cast(update_date as date) = current_date

queries.name: daily_load_summary
queries.description: Row counts loaded today per landing table
queries.query: SELECT 'macp_address_tb' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM landing_db.macp_address_tb WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date UNION ALL SELECT 'macp_cust_address', COUNT(*) FROM landing_db.macp_cust_address WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date UNION ALL SELECT 'macp_customer', COUNT(*) FROM landing_db.macp_customer WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date UNION ALL SELECT 'macp_cust_comm_pref', COUNT(*) FROM landing_db.macp_cust_comm_pref WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date UNION ALL SELECT 'mrd_mbr_info', COUNT(*) FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_info WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date UNION ALL SELECT 'mrd_mbr_prd_dtl', COUNT(*) FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_prd_dtl WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date

chart.title: Daily Load Row Counts by Table

queries.name: source_distribution
queries.description: Distribution of records across source systems
queries.query: SELECT CASE WHEN table_name LIKE 'macp%' THEN 'MACP' ELSE 'MRD' END AS source_system, SUM(cnt) AS total_rows FROM (SELECT 'macp_address_tb' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM landing_db.macp_address_tb WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date UNION ALL SELECT 'macp_cust_address', COUNT(*) FROM landing_db.macp_cust_address WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date UNION ALL SELECT 'macp_customer', COUNT(*) FROM landing_db.macp_customer WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date UNION ALL SELECT 'macp_cust_comm_pref', COUNT(*) FROM landing_db.macp_cust_comm_pref WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date UNION ALL SELECT 'mrd_mbr_info', COUNT(*) FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_info WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date UNION ALL SELECT 'mrd_mbr_prd_dtl', COUNT(*) FROM landing_db.mrd_mbr_prd_dtl WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) = current_date) GROUP BY 1

queries.name: weekly_load_trend
queries.description: Daily row counts over the past 7 days across all landing tables
queries.query: SELECT cast(load_timestamp as date) AS load_date, COUNT(*) AS total_rows FROM landing_db.macp_address_tb WHERE cast(load_timestamp as date) >= date_add('day', -7, current_date) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
